structured.name: Get Customer Information
structured.objective: To enable the CSMS to retrieve raw customer information from a Charging Station.
structured.description:
The CSMS sends a message to the Charging Station to retrieve raw customer information, for
example to be compliant with local privacy laws. The Charging Station notifies the CSMS by
sending one or more reports.
scenario:
1. The CSMS sends a CustomerInformationRequest with the report flag set to true to the Charging
Station with a reference to a customer (idToken, customerCertificate or customerIdentifier).

2. The Charging Station responds with CustomerInformationResponse, indicating whether it will
send it or not.

3. The Charging Station sends one or more NotifyCustomerInformationRequest messages to the
CSMS.

4. The CSMS responds with one or more NotifyCustomerInformationResponse messages to the
Charging Station.
structured.postconditions:
The CSMS has Successfully received a CustomerInformationResponse message with status
Accepted AND has Successfully received the requested data.
structured.remarks:
The fact that customerCertificate can be supplied to CustomerInformationRequest does not imply
that there is a requirement to store plug-and-charge contract certificates on a charging station.

Charging Station.
requirements.definition:
The report flag in the CustomerInformationRequest
SHALL be set to true.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
CustomerInformationRequest AND
it is in a state where it can process
this request.
requirements.definition:
the Charging Station SHALL respond with a
CustomerInformationResponse message with
status Accepted .

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station is in a
state where it cannot process this
request.
requirements.definition:
On receipt of the CustomerInformationRequest the
Charging Station SHALL respond with a
CustomerInformationResponse with status
Rejected .

The CSMS SHALL include a reference to a
customer by including either an idToken,
customerCertificate or customerIdentifier in the
CustomerInformationRequest.

requirements.precondition:
N09.FR.02 AND
the Charging Station has information
stored about the customer referred to
by the customer identifier
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send the requested
information via one or more
NotifyCustomerInformationRequest messages to
the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
N09.FR.02 AND
the Charging Station has no
information stored about the
customer referred to by the customer
identifier.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send one
NotifyCustomerInformationRequest message to
the CSMS with the data field set to an empty string.

requirements.precondition:
When receiving a
CustomerInformationRequest with
both the report flag as well as the
clear flag are set to false
requirements.definition:
It is RECOMMENDED to respond with status a
CustomerInformationResponse message with
status Rejected .

requirements.precondition:
When requesting user information
according to the customerCertificate
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL use the hashAlgorithm, which
was used to install the certificate.

requirements.precondition:
When CustomerInformationRequest
contains none of idToken,
customerCertificate or
customerIdentifier OR
CustomerInformationRequest
contains more than one of idToken,
customerCertificate or
customerIdentifier
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHALL respond with status =
Invalid

chunks.content:
# N09 - Get Customer Information

**Objective:** To enable the CSMS to retrieve raw customer information from a Charging Station.

**Description:** The CSMS sends a message to the Charging Station to retrieve raw customer information, for
example to be compliant with local privacy laws. The Charging Station notifies the CSMS by
sending one or more reports.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The CSMS sends a CustomerInformationRequest with the report flag set to true to the Charging
Station with a reference to a customer (idToken, customerCertificate or customerIdentifier).
2. The Charging Station responds with CustomerInformationResponse, indicating whether it will
send it or not.
3. The Charging Station sends one or more NotifyCustomerInformationRequest messages to the
CSMS.
4. The CSMS responds with one or more NotifyCustomerInformationResponse messages to the
Charging Station.

**Prerequisites:** n/a

**Postconditions:** The CSMS has Successfully received a CustomerInformationResponse message with status
Accepted AND has Successfully received the requested data.

**Remarks:** The fact that customerCertificate can be supplied to CustomerInformationRequest does not imply
that there is a requirement to store plug-and-charge contract certificates on a charging station.

# N09 - Requirements

**N09.FR.01**
Precondition: When the CSMS wants to retrieve
CustomerInformation from the
Charging Station.
The report flag in the CustomerInformationRequest
SHALL be set to true.

**N09.FR.02**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
CustomerInformationRequest AND
it is in a state where it can process
this request.
the Charging Station SHALL respond with a
CustomerInformationResponse message with
status Accepted .

**N09.FR.03**
Precondition: When the Charging Station is in a
state where it cannot process this
request.
On receipt of the CustomerInformationRequest the
Charging Station SHALL respond with a
CustomerInformationResponse with status
Rejected .

**N09.FR.04**
The CSMS SHALL include a reference to a
customer by including either an idToken,
customerCertificate or customerIdentifier in the
CustomerInformationRequest.

**N09.FR.05**
Precondition: N09.FR.02 AND
the Charging Station has information
stored about the customer referred to
by the customer identifier
The Charging Station SHALL send the requested
information via one or more
NotifyCustomerInformationRequest messages to
the CSMS.

**N09.FR.06**
Precondition: N09.FR.02 AND
the Charging Station has no
information stored about the
customer referred to by the customer
identifier.
The Charging Station SHALL send one
NotifyCustomerInformationRequest message to
the CSMS with the data field set to an empty string.

**N09.FR.07**
Precondition: When receiving a
CustomerInformationRequest with
both the report flag as well as the
clear flag are set to false
It is RECOMMENDED to respond with status a
CustomerInformationResponse message with
status Rejected .

**N09.FR.08**
Precondition: When requesting user information
according to the customerCertificate
The CSMS SHALL use the hashAlgorithm, which
was used to install the certificate.

**N09.FR.09**
Precondition: When CustomerInformationRequest
contains none of idToken,
customerCertificate or
customerIdentifier OR
CustomerInformationRequest
contains more than one of idToken,
customerCertificate or
customerIdentifier
Charging Station SHALL respond with status =
Invalid
